ocr.text: The data from Table 1 presents enzyme activities in U/mg protein across various strains. For strain FS35, the Hcd activity is
recorded at 0.25 ± 0.03 and Ccr at 0.08 ± 0.01. Strain HA-Hcd shows Hcd activity of 0.49 ± 0.05 and Ccr at 0.13 ± 0.01. The
HA-Ccr strain exhibits Hcd activity of 0.27 ± 0.03 and Ccr activity of 0.28 ± 0.03.
Polymorphisms  CAD group  Control Group  OR (95% Cl)  P-value
Lastly, the HA-Hcd-Ccr strain has Hcd activity measured at 0.55 ± 0.05 and Ccr at 0.35 ± 0.04. Table 2 details polymorphisms
in relation to CAD and control groups, with NF-κB1 rs28362491 showing no data for the CAD or control groups. The ins/ins
genotype has 47 individuals in the CAD group and 53 in the control group, serving as the reference. The Ins/del genotype
comprises 50 in the CAD group, 38 in the control group, with an odds ratio (OR) of 1.48 (95% confidence interval [Cl] 0.83-
2.64) and a P-value of 0.191. The del/del genotype includes 23 in the CAD group and 9 in the control group, with an OR of 2.88
(95% Cl 1.21-6.84) and a P-value of 0.015. For NF-κBIA rs 2233406, the CC genotype has 62 in the CAD group and 60 in the
control group, while CT has 42 in CAD and 32 in control, with an OR of 1.27 (95% Cl 0.71-2.27) and a P-value of 0.46. The
TT genotype shows 16 in CAD and 8 in control with an OR of 1.93 (95% Cl 0.77-4.85) and a P-value of 0.183.
